title: Keyboard Shortcut - Collapse/Expand Subitems

posts.author: Bennett (Bennett Killmer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I’m constantly opening and closing subitems. Being able to just hover and press a key would greatly improve the flow, reduce scrolling, and make Monday even better Here’s what I wish existed…

NEW KYBD SHORTCUT - Collapse/Expand Subitems (of ITEM mouse is hovering over)
NEW KYBD SHORTCUT - Collapse/Expand Subitems of All Items (of GROUP mouse is hovering over)

Thanks!

posts.author: Smittyto15 (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml: Or atleast something like Collapse/Expand All Subitems would be a good start / middle ground.

posts.author: Regan (Regan Ludwar)
posts.cookedHtml: YES PLEASE!!! Keyboard Shortcut to 1) Expand all Items in a Group 2) Expand all Sub-task in a task
